name: kiln
description: Multi-model software creation pipeline — native Claude Code, one kernel, five stage cards, two model families (Claude + GPT-5.6 via Codex).

plugins.name: kiln
plugins.description: One command turns a conversation into working, tested software. An interactive brainstorm first, then a single content-blind kernel walks the autonomous stages — law, build, validate, report — from the stage cards. Claude builds; GPT-5.6 (via Codex CLI) reviews every seal in a fresh context; Claude-only fallback, honestly marked, when Codex is absent.
